utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: Present with description of physical and mental health insurance and includes costs (monthly_cost given, mentions add-on). Fully specified per format. 2) property_coverage: Present with home/contents coverage and monthly_cost provided. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Present with travel insurance details and monthly_cost provided. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: Present with enhancement services and monthly_cost provided. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: Present with cost breakdown information and monthly_cost. Fully specified. All 5 items are included with required details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final plan: Health coverage mentions 'InsurePlus Standard Mental Health' and an 'Emergency Mental Health Care' add-on, plus Isabella to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan'. These correspond to ground-truth items: Mental health: InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 6); Health enhancement services: Emergency Mental Health Care (rating 8); Primary physical health for Isabella: LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8). Property coverage cites 'PremiumSecure Luxury' for home content with Golf Equipment Protection and Business Equipment Coverage, but these exact names do not exist in the ground-truth list; therefore, no direct rating match for those terms. Travel coverage cites 'ExecutiveGlobal Platinum' and 'Medical Emergency Plus' add-on, which also do not match any ground-truth item names. Additional services 'Executive Insurance Concierge' and 'ConsultingPro partner-level package' are not in ground-truth. Thus, only map the items that exactly match ground-truth names.
